narrative.description: Sega's Genesis sequel introduces Tails as a co-op companion and ramps up momentum platforming with faster zones, spin-dash acceleration, and the iconic Chemical Plant and Metropolis stages.
narrative.core_loop: Build speed through loop geometry, spin-dash into enemies, reach act goals before the timer expires, and defeat Dr. Robotnik in zone boss encounters.

mechanics.map_notes: Physics reward maintaining velocity through loops, slopes, and springs.
mechanics.expression: Physics reward maintaining velocity through loops, slopes, and springs.

mechanics.map_notes: Jump and spin-dash destroy enemies and break certain walls.
mechanics.expression: Jump and spin-dash destroy enemies and break certain walls.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives and continues gate retries on hazard death.
mechanics.expression: Lives and continues gate retries on hazard death.

mechanics.map_notes: Tails follows and can carry Sonic in co-op flight sequences.
mechanics.expression: Tails follows and can carry Sonic in co-op flight sequences.

mechanics.map_notes: Spikes, crushers, and drowning timers punish mistakes.
mechanics.expression: Spikes, crushers, and drowning timers punish mistakes.

mechanics.map_notes: Robotnik machines follow zone-specific attack patterns.
mechanics.expression: Robotnik machines follow zone-specific attack patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Final Death Egg fight spans multiple arena configurations.
mechanics.expression: Final Death Egg fight spans multiple arena configurations.

mechanics.map_notes: Special stages and hidden paths reward exploration.
mechanics.expression: Special stages and hidden paths reward exploration.

mechanics.map_notes: Platform sections demand tight jump timing at high speed.
mechanics.expression: Platform sections demand tight jump timing at high speed.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss machines expose weak points during attack wind-ups.
mechanics.expression: Boss machines expose weak points during attack wind-ups.

mechanics.map_notes: Checkpoints activate after passing lamppost markers.
mechanics.expression: Checkpoints activate after passing lamppost markers.

mechanics.map_notes: Rings act as a buffer; zero rings means death on hit.
mechanics.expression: Rings act as a buffer; zero rings means death on hit.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Sonic the Hedgehog 2 through its core platformer loop.
